definition: Capacity of a strategy to reduce direct harm and protect critical functions
measurement_note: Use hazard reduction service continuity health safety and impact evidence

definition: Actual funding services infrastructure housing healthcare transport legal support insurance or public capacity provided to affected people
measurement_note: Use budget access benefit coverage infrastructure repair and service indicators

definition: Ability of affected people to access aid rebuilding relocation public benefits and recovery services
measurement_note: Use eligibility language disability tenure documentation speed and affordability indicators

definition: Depth of participation co-design community authority transparency and public accountability
measurement_note: Use decision records co-determination public review appeal mechanisms and local authority indicators

definition: Capacity to repair or redesign systems that repeatedly produce vulnerability
measurement_note: Use land use reform housing reform infrastructure investment ecological restoration and anti-lock-in indicators

definition: Degree to which future exposure is materially reduced rather than normalized
measurement_note: Use hazard maps repeated loss data heat flood smoke outage and displacement indicators

definition: Degree to which costs risk labor debt displacement surveillance or loss are transferred to vulnerable groups
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because resilience becomes abandonment risk

definition: Administrative financial technical political and participation burden required to implement the strategy
measurement_note: Higher values require capacity and sequencing review
